commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared legacy `openai-codex` migration plan and threads it through doctor provider/config-route, session-route, auth-config/store, and preview-warning repairs.

PR surface: Source +582, Tests +338. Total +920 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main uses canonical `openai` for OpenAI/Codex context lookup, so legacy `openai-codex` context metadata can be ignored after provider unification. I did not run a live packaged upgrade lane in this read-only review.
